expectations.text: Output contains 'Layer 1' (or equivalent Visual/Frontend section heading)
Output contains 'Layer 2' (or equivalent Code Quality section heading)
Output contains 'Layer 3' (or equivalent Security/GDPR section heading)
Output contains at least one severity label: BLOCKER, SHOULD-FIX, or NICE-TO-HAVE
expectations.evidence: Multiple BLOCKER, SHOULD-FIX, NICE-TO-HAVE labels throughout

expectations.text: Output contains a file reference in the format 'file:line' or 'src/pages/index.astro'
Output contains a Summary section with finding counts
expectations.evidence: Line 31: '### Summary' with counts per layer

expectations.text: Layer 1 has more findings than Layer 2 (visual is strictest)
Output flags the generic 'Astro' title as a finding
expectations.evidence: Line 7: BLOCKER on 'Page title is generic placeholder Astro'

expectations.text: No evidence of editing src/ files (no Write/Edit tool calls)
expectations.evidence: Explore subagent is read-only; no file modifications in output
